steps.title: Clarify the claim
steps.content: The student claims that putting a museum work online increases the number of people who experience it. The strongest support should show that online access reaches more people than in-person viewing alone.

steps.title: Use audience evidence
steps.content: A praises the museum but gives no audience count. C only notes that the museum has several Lawrence works. D concerns critics' opinions. A finding that online viewers outnumber museum visitors directly supports increased access. The answer is B.
